description: Permissions scoped to the main Obelus window. Core permissions are narrowed to just the event listen/unlisten surface the renderer actually uses (via @tauri-apps/api/event.listen and the deep-link/store plugins' internal listeners) plus core:app:allow-version for the Settings about-block; every other core:* module is denied. Plugin permissions are pinned to the minimum surface the frontend actually invokes. The FS plugin is registered for Rust-side use only (no JS permissions), so the scoped fs_* commands remain the sole filesystem entry point for untrusted callers. The dialog plugin is exposed to JS for native OS confirmations on destructive actions (dialog:allow-ask) and for the native save sheet used when the user exports a reviewer's letter (dialog:allow-save). The shell plugin is exposed to JS only via shell:allow-open scoped to https://4gentic.ai, used by the Settings imprint link to open the publisher's site in the OS browser.
